====Pokémon====
This listing is of Sidney's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sidney
|pkmn=Zangoose
|gender=male
|type1=Normal
|img=Sidney Zangoose Adventures.png
|epnum=PS251
|epname=The Beginning of the End with Kyogre & Groudon XIII
|desc={{p|Zangoose}} is Sidney's only known Pokémon. He was used to awaken the chamber containing Regirock.

Zangoose's known moves are {{m|Brick Break}} and {{m|Crush Claw}}, and his Ability is {{a|Immunity}}.}}

=====Temporary=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sidney
|pkmn=Regirock
|type1=Rock
|img=Brandon Regirock Adventures.png
|epnum=PS254
|epname=A Royal Rumble with Regirock, Regice, & Registeel II
|main=Brandon's legendary giants
|main_section=Pokémon Adventures
|desc={{p|Regirock}} was awakened by Steven and the Elite Four to be used to contain Groudon and Kyogre's power. Sidney controlled Regirock with Drake while the others controlled Regice and Registeel. After Steven died from the strain of controlling the three Pokémon, Regirock lashed out and ran away. It was later found by [[Brandon]] and captured.}}
